note: SNG-203 tier-6 exemplars — the taste generate('npc_quest') authors against. Both drawn from existing NPCs' authored wants.

npcQuests.name: The Missing Page
npcQuests.want: Thirty years a keeper, and she cannot abide a record with a hole in it — a single ledger page has gone missing from the district archive and it is making her teeth itch.
npcQuests.task: Find the missing archive page (last seen in the Edge District record room) and return it to Keeper Ilma.
npcQuests.reward: Ilma's good regard — and she tells you one true thing about the district she would not tell a stranger.

npcQuests.name: The Late Fare
npcQuests.want: Tam the ferryman is owed a fare by someone who crossed his river three days ago and has not come back to pay — and Tam does not chase debts, he just stops carrying people, which is worse.
npcQuests.task: Find the traveler who owes Tam a crossing-fare and either collect it or settle it yourself.
npcQuests.reward: Free passage across Tam's river for the rest of your time in the valley, and a ferryman who remembers you kindly.

effect.text: Tam the ferryman owes you a good turn; his crossings are open to you.
